#  Delete a Custom Submittal Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permission** :
    * 'Admin' level permission to the project's Submittals tool.
  * **Prerequisite** :
    * You must have at least one (1) report to delete. See [Create a Custom Submittals Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-custom-submittals-report).
  * **Additional Information** :
    * Since custom submittal reports are global and appear for all projects, when you delete one from a project, it will also disappear from all other projects associated with your user account.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.  
This reveals the Submittals page.
  2. Click the **Configure Settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) link.  
This reveals the Submittal Settings page.
  3. In the right-pane, click **Custom Reports**.  
This opens the reports page.
  4. Locate the desired report in the **Custom Reports** or **My Reports** list.
  5. Click the **Delete** icon (i.e., this is the RED 'x' on the right side of the table).
  6. At the 'Are you sure you want to delete the report?' message, click **OK**.   
The system permanently removes the report from the Custom Reports page.


## See Also
  * [Submittals - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/permissions)
  * [Create a Custom Submittals Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-custom-submittals-report)
  * [Edit a Custom Submittal Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/edit-a-custom-submittal-report)
title: Delete a Custom Submittal Report
description: How to delete a custom submittal report using the Project level Submittals tool.
